headline: Expedia : Study Reveals Travelers Are High-Value Consumers, Spending $500+ Per Trip On Non-Travel Purchases
summary: New global research finds most travelers make significant non-travel purchases tied to their trips, presenting a unique market opportunity for non-travel brands to reach a valuable consumer segment ...
